message:
feat: make todo panel resizable with draggable left edge (#119)

- Increase default width from 280px to 360px
- Add drag handle on left border for resize (240–700px range)
- Persist width to localStorage across sessions
- Visual feedback: handle highlights on hover, turns blue while dragging
- Disable text selection during drag to prevent annoying highlights

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
